JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-22-2002 Text Ruling

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-12-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Cause assigned to Dept. 218 for settlement conference. Judge: L. Norris, Clerk: A. Huie, Reporter: D. Neville. Byron Clayton Thompson appeared on behalf of plaintiff and Joseph A. Sacramento for defendant.
Settlement conference held, Matter not reported. Case did not settle. Trial date of AUG-19-2002 confirmed.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-08-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. Tentative ruling adopted by the Court -- Defendant NOOR JHAN's Demurrer to Complaint: Overruled - 5 days leave to answer. Motion to strike: Denied. (JJM/MD) Reporter: Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855

MOTION Notice Of Motion To Quash Service Of Summons;
Off Calendar Jun-07-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Byron C. Thompson, Esq. of THOMPSON, LAWSON LLP 510/835-1600 for Plaintiff and opposing party

Plaintiff's witness JOHN SHARPER (process server) was sworn and examined. The Court having heard testimony, DENIED defendant NOOR JHAN and TARIQ JAVAID's motion to quash service of summons. (JJM/nh) Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855
